steps.title: Find the broad claim
steps.content: The text opens by saying animals use tools for goals such as grooming, finding food, and protection. It then challenges the old idea that tool use was unique to primates.

steps.title: Use the examples
steps.content: Elephants using branches and woodpecker finches using cactus spines both support the same broad point. Choice A adds an unsupported claim about intelligence, Choice B is too narrow, and Choice C is not discussed. The answer is D.
